data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the qualification status lifecycle and owner assignment, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or records that confirm these aspects. The prior steps focus on booking confirmations and customer sign-ups, which do not directly address the qualification status or owner assignment. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of qualification status lifecycle and owner assignment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the qualification status lifecycle and owner assignment.
